description: Search, analyze and manage events on OpenAgenda.
name: com.openagenda/mcp

environmentVariables.description: OpenAgenda API key (the stdio credential — a least-privilege/read key is advised). The hosted remote uses OAuth instead.
environmentVariables.name: OA_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: v3 API base URL (defaults to https://api.openagenda.com/v3).
environmentVariables.name: OA_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Code engine: node (default — Node's permission sandbox: no filesystem/subprocess; network NOT bounded) or deno (adds a scoped network egress boundary; recommended hardening, needs deno installed).
environmentVariables.name: OA_EXECUTOR

environmentVariables.description: Disable the Node permission sandbox entirely (bare node, NO boundary at all) — trusted/dev use only.
environmentVariables.name: OA_LOCAL_NO_SANDBOX

title: OpenAgenda
